allow: Bash(helm template test-release filebrowser/ -f filebrowser/values-example.yaml 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(helm template test-release filebrowser/ --set secret.existingSecret=my-external-secret 2>&1 | grep -A5 "secret\\|Secret" | head -20)
Bash(helm template test filebrowser/ --set persistence.config.enabled=false --set persistence.data.enabled=false 2>&1 | grep -E "PersistentVolumeClaim|config-pvc|data-pvc" | head -10)
